title: 'SWIM' Officially Tops Billboard Hot 100 — BTS's 7th No. 1 Single; 13 ARIRANG Tracks Chart Simultaneously
detail: Billboard officially confirms 'Swim' debuted at No. 1 on the Billboard Hot 100 (chart dated April 4, 2026) — BTS's 7th Hot 100 No. 1 single and their first since 2021. BTS becomes the first South Korean artist to simultaneously top both the Billboard Hot 100 and Billboard 200 in the same chart week. 13 of ARIRANG's 14 tracks chart simultaneously on the Hot 100, a record for a K-pop album. Chart positions: Swim (#1), Body to Body (#25), Hooligan (#35), FYA (#36), Normal (#41), Aliens (#47), 2.0 (#50), Merry Go Round (#52), Like Animals (#53), They Don't Know 'bout Us (#56), One More Night (#61), Please (#63), Into the Sun (#68).

title: BTS Places Songs at #1–#13 on Billboard Global 200 — Historic Chart Sweep
detail: BTS places songs at positions #1 through #13 on the Billboard Global 200 chart (dated April 4, 2026) — the first artist in Billboard history to occupy the entire top 10 (and beyond) of any major chart simultaneously. 'Swim' tops the Global 200, giving BTS a record 8 No. 1 songs on that chart, surpassing Taylor Swift, Bad Bunny, and Ariana Grande. The sweep also extends to the Billboard Global Excl. U.S. chart, where BTS occupies the top 13 positions.
